data.title: Top US banking regulator rescinds previous digital asset restrictions amid Trump’s push to end crypto debanking
data.description:
The U.S. OCC set out to clarify that crypto activities are allowed in the federal banking system, rescinding its previous stance.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/345324/top-us-banking-regulator-rescinds-previous-digital-asset-restrictions-amid-trumps-push-to-end-crypto-debanking?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Dormant Bitcoin Wallet Linked To Dark Web Market Transfers Millions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a Bitcoin wallet associated with the dark web market Nucleus has become active, transferring $77.5 million worth of Bitcoin to three new addresses. The main wallet still holds $365 million in Bitcoin. This wallet had been inactive since Nucleus shut down in April 2016.

data.title: Ripple co-founder’s $150M hack tied to LastPass password vault breach
data.description:
A forfeiture complaint shared by blockchain detective ZachXBT revealed that the $150 million hack suffered by Ripple co-founder Chris Larsen resulted from private keys stored in the password manager LastPass, which was compromised in 2022.  The complaint details how the attackers accessed Larsen’s cryptocurrency wallets through stolen vault data from LastPass. LastPass compromise In December...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/ripple-co-founders-150m-hack-tied-to-lastpass-password-vault-breach/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 86,000 USDT with a 3.94% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 07, 2025, 21:56 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 86,000 USDT and is now trading at 85,922.820313 USDT, with a narrowed 3.94% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Interm SEC Chair Mark Uyeda Anticipates Less Active Rulemaking: We Want To Be 'Very Methodical'
data.description:
Interim SEC Chair Mark Uyeda replaced Gary Gensler as highest-ranking official, signaling a change in direction and reversing Gensler's actions. Uyeda also faces staffing cuts and policy shifts during his tenure.

source: https://www.benzinga.com/government/regulations/25/03/44205650/interm-sec-chair-mark-uyeda-anticipates-less-active-rulemaking-we-want-to-be-very-methodic?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Trump Aims To Advance Stablecoin Legislation Before August Recess
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump announced at a White House cryptocurrency summit that efforts will be made to advance stablecoin legislation before the August recess. Initially, the goal was to have the legislation ready within the first 100 days of his term, but this timeline has now been extended by four months.
